title: Sanji Pushes Luffy Away
description: On pages 7–10, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Cracker, Unknown person #6, Nami, Unknown person #7, Pudding as Sanji’s childhood trauma and the political trap around his marriage collide with Luffy’s refusal to abandon him.
scene: Sanji tries to protect the crew by rejecting Luffy, but Luffy refuses to accept a false goodbye.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Well, either way...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: We won!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Share in my enthusiasm, for crying out loud!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We just beat the living crap out of an officer in a yonko's crew!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: ...oh my... what have we done?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Someone seems

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Can't... move...

dialogue.speaker: Cracker
dialogue.text: I've helped these ruffians defeat Lord cracker-ju!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: It is common knowledge amongst us homes...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: that we are all powerless in the face of Mama's Vivre card...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: and so to that end, even her own children...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Are prohibited from carrying one around! And yet...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Just how is it that you of all people...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Wow, that's news to me! I'm beginning to have a greater appreciation of just how valuable this thing really is!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Nevermind that, you have no clue as to the precious position we're all in now!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Rumor has it that when commander snack was defeated in a battle a while back...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Cracker's troops swarmed out into the sea to seek revenge and linlin...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: created a storm which was supposedly the physical manifestation of her rage...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And together, they ann childhood the enemy in the blink of an eye!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: A storm?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Linlin is a woman with the ability to control and manipulate the weather!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Her left hand can summon "Zets" the thunder cloud,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And her right hand can summon "prometheus" the sun!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Once she crosses that line... there is absolutely nothing any- one can do to contain her rage!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: My advice to all of you is to leave this place while you are able...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Before Linlin finds you and has her way with you!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Control ...the weather?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That doesn't sound like such a big deal.... {whereze wheeze>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>> whereze>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Heck, you should see me when I'm throwing one of my raging tantrums...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Dammit, Sanji...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What were you thinking leaving that stupid letter behind and just running off like that?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He could have at least said something to our faces!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: TO MY BUS: THERE'S THIS CHICK I GOTTA SEE REAL QUICK. I'LL BE BACK, I PROMISE. SANDI

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is a problem I have to handle. I promise it won't take long!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Say hi to those idiots for me!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We were able to make it this far,

dialogue.speaker: Pudding
dialogue.text: Thanks to pudding's map...

dialogue.speaker: Pekoms
dialogue.text: But then pekoms just vanished...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Pudding said she'd gonna bring Sanji to us,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But when we arrived at the meeting point, nobody showed up at the coast!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Then we get lost in this forest, losing valuable time in the process.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I mean, isn't Sanji officially gonna be part of big mom's crew once the wedding is over?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We still have no idea when the actual ceremony will take place. I did hear that the Vinsmokes were supposed to be visiting the castle today.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What time is it now? We've got to stop them from entering the castle!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Hey, tree!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You know where the castle is, don't you?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Carry me there!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll definitely gonna bring him back with me!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Is it just me or are the people in the town freaking out about something?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Perhaps they caught wind of our arrival and couldn't contain them- selves?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: No worries, Nami!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If all goes well, we should be able to-...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Sawend, however,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: gyaaa aah!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Chopper, exactly what part of this is going well for you guys?! How are you holding up?!

summary: This section advances the Sanji and the Vinsmokes storyline with 55 dialogue beats. Sanji’s family trauma and the forced wedding turn the rescue mission into an emotional test of loyalty.
